SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ArrayPart<S,E,T>
Methods that all array validators must contain.
BigDecimalValidator
Validates the state of a BigDecimal value.
BigIntegerValidator
Validates the state of a BigInteger value.
BooleanValidator
Validates the state of a Boolean value.
ByteArrayValidator
Validates the state of an byte[] value.
ByteValidator
Validates the state of a Byte value.
CharacterValidator
Validates the state of a Character value.
CheckReturnValue
Indicates that the result of a method call should not be ignored.
ClassValidator<T>
Validates the state of a Class value.
CollectionPart<S,E>
Methods that all Collection validators must contain.
CollectionValidator<E,T>
Validates the state of a Collection value.
ComparablePart<S,T>
Methods that all Comparable validators must contain.
ComparableValidator<T>
Validates the state of a Comparable value.
Configuration
Determines the behavior of a validator.
ConfigurationUpdater
Updates the configuration used by new validators.
DecimalNumber<S>
Methods that all decimal Number validators must contain.
DefaultGuavaValidators
Creates validators for the Guava API, using the default configuration.
DefaultJacksonValidators
Creates validators for the Jackson API, using the default configuration.
DefaultJavaValidators
Creates validators for the Java API, using the default configuration.
DoubleValidator
Validates the state of a Double value.
EqualityMethod
The method used to check whether two values are equal.
FixedPrecisionDecimalNumber<S>
Methods that all fixed-precision Number validators must contain.
FloatValidator
Validates the state of a Float value.
GlobalConfiguration
The configuration shared by all validators.
GuavaAssumeThat
Creates validators for the Guava API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
GuavaCheckIf
Creates validators for the Guava API, recording any failures that occur.
GuavaRequireThat
Creates validators for the Guava API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
GuavaValidators
Creates validators for the Guava API with an independent configuration.
InetAddressValidator
Validates the state of an InetAddress value.
IntegerValidator
Validates the state of an Integer value.
JacksonAssumeThat
Creates validators for the Jackson API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
JacksonCheckIf
Creates validators for the Jackson API, recording any failures that occur.
JacksonRequireThat
Creates validators for the Jackson API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
JacksonValidators
Creates validators for the Jackson API with an independent configuration.
JavaAssumeThat
Creates validators for class invariants and method postconditions of the Java API, throwing AssertionError if a failure occurs.
JavaCheckIf
Creates validators for the Java API, recording any failures that occur.
JavaRequireThat
Creates validators for method preconditions of the Java API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
JavaValidators
Creates validators for the Java API with an independent configuration.
JsonNodeValidator<T>
Validates the state of a JsonNode, throwing an exception on the first failure.
ListValidator<E,T>
Validates the state of a List value.
LongValidator
Validates the state of a Long value.
MapValidator<K,V,T>
Validates the state of a Map value.
MultimapValidator<K,V,T>
Validates the state of a Multimap, throwing an exception on the first failure.
MultipleFailuresException
Thrown if multiple validations have failed.
MutableStringMappers
Returns the String representation of objects.
NegativeNumber<S>
Methods that all Number validators must contain.
ObjectArrayValidator<E,A>
Validates the state of an Object[] value.
ObjectPart<S,T>
Methods that all object validators must contain.
ObjectValidator<T>
Validates the state of an Object value.
OptionalValidator<T>
Validates the state of an Optional value.
PathValidator
Validates the state of a Path value.
PrimitiveBooleanArrayValidator
Validates the state of a boolean[] value.
PrimitiveBooleanValidator
Validates the state of a boolean value.
PrimitiveByteArrayValidator
Validates the state of a byte[] value.
PrimitiveByteValidator
Validates the state of a byte value.
PrimitiveCharacterArrayValidator
Validates the state of a char[] value.
PrimitiveCharacterValidator
Validates the state of a char value.
PrimitiveDoubleArrayValidator
Validates the state of a double[] value.
PrimitiveDoubleValidator
Validates the state of a double value.
PrimitiveFloatArrayValidator
Validates the state of a float[] value.
PrimitiveFloatValidator
Validates the state of a float value.
PrimitiveIntegerArrayValidator
Validates the state of a int[] value.
PrimitiveIntegerValidator
Validates the state of an int value.
PrimitiveLongArrayValidator
Validates the state of a long[] value.
PrimitiveLongValidator
Validates the state of a long value.
PrimitiveShortArrayValidator
Validates the state of a short[] value.
PrimitiveShortValidator
Validates the state of a short value.
PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
Validates the state of an int value that supports negative values.
ShortValidator
Validates the state of a Short value.
StringMapper
Returns a String representation of an object.
StringMappers
Returns the String representation of objects.
StringValidator
Validates the state of a String value.
TerminalEncoding
The ANSI escape codes supported by the terminal.
UnsignedNumber<S>
Methods that all unsigned Number validators must contain.
UpdatableGlobalConfiguration
Updates the global configuration shared by all validators.
UriValidator
Validates the state of a URI value.
UrlValidator
Validates the state of a URL value.
ValidationFailure
A failed validation.
Validator<S>
Methods that all validators must contain.
Validators<S>
A factory that creates different types of validators.
